landing.heroDesc: Spark teaches children to work with AI — not just use it. Creative missions, a safe environment, and clear progress that parents can follow.
landing.frameworkTitle: The 4D Framework — the core of Spark
landing.frameworkDesc: Four skills that empower your child to use AI with wisdom and creativity.
landing.frameworkD1Desc: When should you use AI and when shouldn't you? Your child learns to divide tasks between themselves and the machine.
landing.frameworkD2Desc: How do I talk to AI? Clear instructions get better answers — your child learns the art.
landing.frameworkD3Desc: Is this right? Your child learns to evaluate AI responses and tell truth from nonsense.
landing.frameworkD4Desc: What am I responsible for? Your child learns about ethics, honesty, and using technology responsibly.
landing.pricingDesc: Start for free. Upgrade when your child is ready for more.
landing.pricingCardProDesc: The full journey — all missions and AI support.
landing.faq1A: Spark is designed for children aged 10–14. The missions and interface are tailored to their developmental level and interests.
landing.faq2A: Yes. All AI interactions go through our safety filters. The AI cannot search the internet or share personal information. Data is never used to train external models.
landing.faq3Q: Do I need to know about AI?
landing.faq3A: Not at all. The parent dashboard shows you exactly what your child is learning and gives you conversation starters you can use at home.
landing.footer: © 2026 Spark by Antigravity. All rights reserved.

methodology.desc: We don't just teach children to use AI — we teach them to understand it, steer it, and think critically about its output.
methodology.d1Desc: What should AI do and what should I do myself? Your child learns to delegate wisely — the machine helps, but the child leads.
methodology.d2Desc: How should I word my instructions? Clear language gets better answers. Your child practises the art of talking to technology.
methodology.d3Desc: Is this right or wrong? Your child learns to spot errors, bias, and evaluate whether the AI is telling the truth.
methodology.d4Desc: What am I responsible for? The child has the final word — they review, refine, and make the work their own. No copying, only original work.
methodology.safeDesc: Spark is built on the principle that your child's safety always comes first.
methodology.safe1Desc: Your child's data is never used to train external models or sold to third parties. Everything stays on our servers.
methodology.safe2Desc: Children don't get the answers — they learn to ask the right questions and build deeper understanding.
methodology.safe3Desc: You see all your child's progress, what they've learned, and get conversation starters for home.
methodology.ctaDesc: Register your child today and see how the 4D framework turns curiosity into real skills.
